name: Assetto Corsa
description: Assetto Corsa server manager template using seejy/assetto-server-manager. It persists Assetto server files and validates SteamCMD installation during setup so the runtime container does not start broken.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
steam_root=/mnt/server/steamcmd
steam_home=/mnt/server/steam-home
install_dir=/mnt/server/assetto
mkdir -p "$install_dir" "$steam_root" "$steam_home" /mnt/server/dot-steam
install_steamcmd() {
  rm -f /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz
  curl --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 -fsSL -o /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
  tar -xzf /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz -C "$steam_root"
}
if [ ! -x "$steam_root/steamcmd.sh" ] || [ ! -x "$steam_root/linux32/steamcmd" ]; then
  rm -rf "$steam_root"
  mkdir -p "$steam_root"
  install_steamcmd
fi
cat > "$steam_root/steamcmd" <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
export HOME="${HOME:-/home/assetto/server-manager/steam-home}"
exec /home/assetto/server-manager/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"
EOF
chmod +x "$steam_root/steamcmd" "$steam_root/steamcmd.sh"
for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  if HOME="$steam_home" "$steam_root/steamcmd.sh" +quit; then
    break
  fi
  status=$?
  if [ "$attempt" -eq 5 ]; then
    exit "$status"
  fi
  rm -rf "$steam_root/package" "$steam_root/linux32/steamcmd"
  install_steamcmd
  sleep $((attempt * 5))
done
steam_username="${STEAM_USER:-}"
steam_password="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
steam_username="${steam_username//\"/}"
steam_password="${steam_password//\"/}"
steam_username="${steam_username//$'\r'/}"
steam_username="${steam_username//$'\n'/}"
steam_password="${steam_password//$'\r'/}"
steam_password="${steam_password//$'\n'/}"
yaml_quote() {
  printf "'%s'" "$(printf '%s' "$1" | sed "s/'/''/g")"
}
escape_sed_replacement() {
  printf '%s' "$1" | sed -e 's/[\/&\\]/\\&/g'
}
steam_username_yaml=$(yaml_quote "$steam_username")
steam_password_yaml=$(yaml_quote "$steam_password")
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/config.yml ]; then
cat > /mnt/server/config.yml <<EOF
steam:
  username: $steam_username_yaml
  password: $steam_password_yaml
  install_path: assetto
  executable_path: acServer
  force_update: false
http:
  hostname: 0.0.0.0:8772
  session_key: change-this-session-key
  server_manager_base_URL:
  session_store_type: cookie
  session_store_path: ""
  tls:
    enabled: false
    cert_path: ""
    key_path: ""
monitoring:
  enabled: false
store:
  type: boltdb
  path: server_manager.db
  shared_data_path:
  scheduled_event_check_loop: 0s
accounts:
  admin_password_override: ""
live_map:
  refresh_interval_ms: 500
server:
  audit_logging: true
  performance_mode: false
  dont_open_browser: true
  scan_content_folder_for_changes: false
  use_car_name_cache: true
  persist_mid_session_results: false
  plugins: []
championships:
  recaptcha:
    site_key:
    secret_key:
lua:
  enabled: false
EOF
else
  if [ -n "${STEAM_USER:-}" ]; then sed -i "s/^  username: .*/  username: $(escape_sed_replacement "$steam_username_yaml")/" /mnt/server/config.yml || true; fi
  if [ -n "${STEAM_PASS:-}" ]; then sed -i "s/^  password: .*/  password: $(escape_sed_replacement "$steam_password_yaml")/" /mnt/server/config.yml || true; fi
  sed -i "s/^  force_update: .*/  force_update: false/" /mnt/server/config.yml || true
fi
if [ ! -d "$install_dir/system" ] && [ "${ASSETTO_PREINSTALL:-1}" = "1" ]; then
  if [ -z "${STEAM_USER:-}" ] || [ "${STEAM_USER}" = "anonymous" ] || [ -z "${STEAM_PASS:-}" ]; then
    echo "Assetto Corsa Dedicated Server app 302550 requires a real Steam account. Set STEAM_USER and STEAM_PASS for an account that can download the Assetto Corsa Dedicated Server tool, or set ASSETTO_PREINSTALL=0 and upload server files to /assetto manually."
    exit 20
  fi
  login_args=(+login "$STEAM_USER" "$STEAM_PASS")
  [ -z "${STEAM_AUTH:-}" ] || login_args+=("$STEAM_AUTH")
  for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
    if HOME="$steam_home" "$steam_root/steamcmd.sh" +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir "$install_dir" "${login_args[@]}" +app_update 302550 validate +quit; then
      break
    fi
    status=$?
    if [ "$attempt" -eq 4 ]; then
      exit "$status"
    fi
    rm -rf "$steam_root/package" "$steam_root/linux32/steamcmd"
    install_steamcmd
    sleep $((attempt * 15))
  done
fi
if [ ! -d "$install_dir/system" ]; then
  echo "Assetto Corsa server files are still missing after setup. Refusing to start a broken Server Manager container."
  exit 30
fi
chmod -R a+rwX /mnt/server
